dev.jeka.core.api.java

Class JkClassLoader

  • java.lang.Object
    • dev.jeka.core.api.java.JkClassLoader

  • public class JkClassLoader
extends java.lang.Object
    Wrapper class around ClassLoader providing convenient methods.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.List<java.lang.String> findClassesHavingMainMethod()
      Returns all class names having a main method.
      java.util.List<java.lang.String> findClassesMatchingAnnotations(java.util.function.Predicate<java.util.List<java.lang.String>> annotationNamePredicate)
      Returns all classes matching the specified annotation predicate.
      java.lang.ClassLoader get()
      Return the URLClassLoader wrapped by this object.
      JkPathSequence getClasspath()
      Returns the classpath for this classloader excluding elements on the platform/system classloader.
      <T> T instantiate(java.lang.String className)
      Creates an instance of the class having the specified name in this class loader.
      boolean isDefined(java.lang.String className)
      Returns if the specified class is defined in this classloader.
      <T> java.lang.Class<T> load(java.lang.String className)
      Delegates the call to ClassLoader.loadClass(String) of this wrapped class loader.
      The specified class is supposed to be defined in this class loader, otherwise an IllegalArgumentException is thrown.
      <T> java.lang.Class<T> loadIfExist(java.lang.String className)
      Loads the class having the specified name or return null if no such class is defined in this classloader.
      static JkClassLoader of(java.lang.ClassLoader classLoader) 
      static JkClassLoader ofCurrent()
      Returns a JkClassLoader wrapping the current thread context classloader.
      static JkClassLoader ofLoaderOf(java.lang.Class<?> clazz)
      Returns a JkClassLoader wrapping the class loader having loaded the specified class.
      java.lang.String toString() 
      java.lang.String toString(int maxEntryCount) 

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

    • Method Detail

      • of

        public static JkClassLoader of(java.lang.ClassLoader classLoader)

      • ofCurrent

        public static JkClassLoader ofCurrent()
        Returns a JkClassLoader wrapping the current thread context classloader.

      • ofLoaderOf

        public static JkClassLoader ofLoaderOf(java.lang.Class<?> clazz)
        Returns a JkClassLoader wrapping the class loader having loaded the specified class.

      • get

        public java.lang.ClassLoader get()
        Return the URLClassLoader wrapped by this object.

      • load

        public <T> java.lang.Class<T> load(java.lang.String className)
        Delegates the call to ClassLoader.loadClass(String) of this wrapped class loader.
        The specified class is supposed to be defined in this class loader, otherwise an IllegalArgumentException is thrown.

      • isDefined

        public boolean isDefined(java.lang.String className)
        Returns if the specified class is defined in this classloader.

      • loadIfExist

        public <T> java.lang.Class<T> loadIfExist(java.lang.String className)
        Loads the class having the specified name or return null if no such class is defined in this classloader.

      • instantiate

        public <T> T instantiate(java.lang.String className)
        Creates an instance of the class having the specified name in this class loader.

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        Overrides:
        toString in class java.lang.Object

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString(int maxEntryCount)

      • findClassesHavingMainMethod

        public java.util.List<java.lang.String> findClassesHavingMainMethod()
        Returns all class names having a main method.

      • findClassesMatchingAnnotations

        public java.util.List<java.lang.String> findClassesMatchingAnnotations(java.util.function.Predicate<java.util.List<java.lang.String>> annotationNamePredicate)
        Returns all classes matching the specified annotation predicate.

      • getClasspath

        public JkPathSequence getClasspath()
        Returns the classpath for this classloader excluding elements on the platform/system classloader.
